programme.title: Durga IPS
programme.desc: Durga starts a crusade against a goon and arrests his son but is injured by the goon's men.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society face real-life challenges and find solutions for it.

programme.title: Wagle Ki Duniya
programme.desc: The Wagles navigate the ups and downs of life and overcome their problems together.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: An uneducated woman starts a business and tries to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Dhruv Tara: Samay Sadi Se Pare
programme.desc: An ancient princess meets a doctor as she time travels to the future in search of a cure.

programme.desc: Pashmina's dream of a fairytale romance becomes reality when she meets Raghav.
